definitions.text: Whose arrival is a cause of joy; received with gladness; admitted willingly to the house, entertainment, or company.
examples: Refugees are welcome in our city!
a welcome turn of events; welcome news

definitions.text: Followed by to: free to have or enjoy gratuitously.
examples: You are welcome to the use of my library.
Welcome to the life of Electra Heart!

definitions.text: The act of greeting someone’s arrival, especially by saying "Welcome!"; reception.
The utterance of such a greeting.
Kind reception of a guest or newcomer.
examples: We entered the house and found a ready welcome.

definitions.text: To affirm or greet the arrival of someone, especially by saying "Welcome!".
To accept something willingly or gladly.
